title: Make the Cat Dance
goal: Use a repeat block so the cat moves four times.

steps.prompt: Find the repeat block (it has a little hole inside).
Put the move block inside the repeat.
Press play and watch the cat go!

canned_hints: A repeat block is like saying 'do it again, and again, and again!'
You can drop other blocks INSIDE the repeat block.
Try changing the number inside the repeat. What changes?
